Meta.title: Free URL & Address QR Code Generator | Online QR Maker
Meta.description: Turn URLs and web addresses into QR codes for free. Create link QR codes with transparent backgrounds, custom styles, and instant PNG, JPEG, WebP, or SVG download—no sign-up required.

QrDownloadBar.jpegNoTransparency: JPEG does not support transparent backgrounds.

BackgroundPanel.transparentHint: When on, the background is transparent. When off, the solid color below is used.

QrScanHint.title: Scanning tip
QrScanHint.body: A large center image can cover data modules and make scanning fail.
